task_completion.description: Open the input document in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A GUI word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open displaying the contents of 'employee_handbook.docx'.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 1' style to main section titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Main section titles (e.g., 'General Employment Policies', 'Compensation and Benefits') are formatted with the 'Heading 1' style. This can be verified by looking at the style dropdown menu or sidebar when a main title is selected.
Subsection titles (e.g., 'Equal Opportunity Employment', 'Employment Classifications') are formatted with the 'Heading 2' style, visible in the style selector.
Sub-subsection titles (e.g., 'Reasonable Accommodations', 'Overtime Compensation') are formatted with the 'Heading 3' style, visible in the style selector.

task_completion.description: Configure automatic hierarchical numbering for all headings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Headings display hierarchical numbers (e.g., 1. General Employment Policies, 1.1. Equal Opportunity Employment, 1.1.1. Reasonable Accommodations). The numbers should appear automatically generated (often indicated by a gray background or consistent indentation) and may involve the 'Chapter Numbering' or 'Bullets and Numbering' dialog.
The title bar of the word processor shows 'handbook_numbered.docx' or a 'Save As' dialog is visible showing the correct filename and the path '/home/ga/Documents/'.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with LibreOffice Writer or a similar GUI application, rather than terminal commands or Python scripts modifying the .docx file directly.

integrity.description: The agent used actual styles and automatic numbering features rather than manually typing numbers and changing font sizes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The style dropdown shows 'Heading 1/2/3' instead of 'Default Style' with manual formatting. Numbers preceding headings appear auto-generated (e.g., gray background field) rather than manually typed text.

integrity.description: The agent did not delete or alter the body text of the handbook.
integrity.visual_evidence: The paragraphs of text under each heading remain intact and unmodified.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document contains exactly 6 main sections (Heading 1) including 'General Employment Policies' and 'Compensation and Benefits'; 12 subsections (Heading 2) including 'Equal Opportunity Employment' and 'Employment Classifications'; and 8 sub-subsections (Heading 3) including 'Reasonable Accommodations' and 'Overtime Compensation'. The final document must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/handbook_numbered.docx'.
